name: 朱塞佩·阿尔迪佐内
name_full: 朱塞佩·阿尔迪佐内 Giuseppe Ardizzone
birth_place: 美国,新泽西州,哈肯萨克

last_movies.title: 夜魔侠：重生 第一季

introduction: Giuseppe Ardizzone is an actor/stuntman and first-generation Italian-American. His mother emigrated from the City of Palermo (Kalsa centro storico), Sicily to NYC. His late father emigrated from the Province of Palermo (Cefalù - Lascari - Isnello), Sicily to north New Jersey. Giuseppe was born in Hackensack (Bergen County), an inner suburb of Manhattan.Giuseppe received his BFA degree from the University of Miami (double majoring in motion pictures & theatre). During his time at UMiami, Giuseppe performed in & worked on several mainstage theatre productions at the Jerry Herman Ring Theatre. He has also studied at New York University, and at FAMU (Czech National Academy of Performing Arts) in Prague, Czech Republic.Giuseppe spent approximately three years working at Lionsgate Entertainment (in their NYC office). He began his career at Scott Rudin Productions, as an assistant to producer Mr. Rudin.Giuseppe is a member of SAG-AFTRA , Actors' Equity Association, and the Television Academy.Giuseppe continues to train on his stunt & acting crafts, the latter focusing on Lee Strasberg's Method Techniques with acting coach Marilyn Fried. He is repped by Davien Littlefield Management.
